2604.10169.title: MAVEN-T: Multi-Agent enVironment-aware Enhanced Neural Trajectory predictor with Reinforcement Learning
2604.10169.paper_summary: Trajectory prediction remains a critical yet challenging component in autonomous driving systems, requiring sophisticated reasoning capabilities while meeting strict real-time deployment constraints. While knowledge distillation has demonstrated effectiveness in model compression, existing approaches often fail to preserve complex decision-making capabilities, particularly in dynamic multi-agent scenarios. This paper introduces MAVEN-T, a teacher-student framework that achieves state-of-the-art trajectory prediction through complementary architectural co-design and progressive distillation. The teacher employs hybrid attention mechanisms for maximum representational capacity, while the student uses efficient architectures optimized for deployment. Knowledge transfer is performed via multi-granular distillation with adaptive curriculum learning that dynamically adjusts complexity based on performance. Importantly, the framework incorporates reinforcement learning to overcome the imitation ceiling of traditional distillation, enabling the student to verify, refine, and optimize teacher knowledge through dynamic environmental interaction, potentially achieving more robust decision-making than the teacher itself. Extensive experiments on NGSIM and highD datasets demonstrate 6.2x parameter compression and 3.7x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for deploying sophisticated reasoning models under resource constraints.
2604.10169.paper_summary_zh: 軌跡預測仍然是自動駕駛系統中一個關鍵但具有挑戰性的組成部分，要求具備複雜的推理能力，同時滿足嚴格的實時部署限制。雖然知識蒸餾在模型壓縮方面已顯示出有效性，但現有的方法往往無法保留複雜的決策能力，特別是在動態多代理場景中。本文介紹了MAVEN-T，一個教師-學生框架，通過互補的架構共同設計和漸進式蒸餾實現了最先進的軌跡預測。教師採用混合注意機制以實現最大的表徵能力，而學生則使用為部署優化的高效架構。知識轉移通過多粒度蒸餾進行，並結合自適應課程學習，根據性能動態調整複雜性。重要的是，該框架結合了強化學習，以克服傳統蒸餾的模仿上限，使學生能夠通過動態環境互動驗證、完善和優化教師知識，從而可能實現比教師本身更強健的決策能力。在NGSIM和highD數據集上進行的大規模實驗顯示，參數壓縮達到6.2倍，推理速度提高3.7倍，同時保持最先進的準確性，為在資源限制下部署複雜推理模型建立了一個新範式。
2604.10169.author: Wenchang Duan et.al.
